notes: --- OPERATION SETTING > GENERAL ---
CAT-1 RATE = 38400bps (default)
CAT-1 TIME OUT TIMER = 10msec (default)
CAT-1 CAT-3 STOP BIT = 1bit (default)
--- RADIO SETTING > MODE PSK/DATA (for HF digital) ---
MOD SOURCE = USB (default AUTO, set USB for PC audio input)
RPTT SELECT = RTS (default OFF, set RTS for USB PTT control)
LCUT FREQ = OFF (default 100Hz, set OFF for digital modes)
HCUT FREQ = OFF (default 3200Hz, set OFF for digital modes)
USB OUT LEVEL = 50 (default, receive audio to PC)
USB MOD GAIN = 50 (default, transmit audio from PC)
TX BPF SEL = 50-3050Hz (default, widest passband)
DATA SHIFT (SSB) = 1500Hz (default)
PSK TONE = 1000Hz (default)
NAR WIDTH = 300Hz (default)
--- RADIO SETTING > MODE FM (for FM packet) ---
MOD SOURCE = USB (default AUTO, set USB for PC audio input)
RPTT SELECT = RTS (default OFF, set RTS for USB PTT control)
USB MOD GAIN = 50 (default)
LCUT FREQ = OFF (default 300Hz, set OFF for packet)
HCUT FREQ = OFF (default 3000Hz, set OFF for packet)
--- OPERATIONAL NOTES ---
For HF digital operation always set Mode = DATA-U (DATA-USB)
For FM packet operation always set Mode = DATA-FM
FT8 PRESET button (MODE screen) auto-configures 17 settings for FT8
FT-710 has touchscreen menu: FUNC > category > per-mode settings
No numbered menus like FT-991A — use named menu paths above
